name: Constrain CLI
description: Click-based command-line interface for the Constrain tool. Provides commands to create, resume, list, and display sessions. Handles session management, artifact generation, and user interaction for the conversation engine that finds boundaries between specification and intent.

types.name: SafeGroup
types.description: Click group with centralized exception handling. Catches and handles ClickException, Abort, KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and general exceptions.

functions.name: ensure_api_key
functions.description: Retrieves and validates the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment variables. Strips whitespace and ensures the key is non-empty.

error_cases.name: missing_api_key
error_cases.condition: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable is not set or is empty/whitespace

error_data.message: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set. Export it or add it to your shell profile.

postconditions: Returns a non-empty stripped API key string

structured_side_effects.description: Reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable

functions.name: _round_options
functions.description: Decorator function that adds four Click options (--min-understand, --max-understand, --min-challenge, --max-challenge) to a command function. Each option is an optional integer with a default of None.

inputs.name: f
inputs.description: The function to decorate with round limit options

postconditions: Returns the decorated function with four additional Click option parameters

functions.name: _resolve_int
functions.description: Resolves an integer value from CLI argument, environment variable, or default. Validates that environment variable values are positive integers if present.

inputs.name: default
inputs.description: Default value if neither CLI nor env are set

error_cases.name: invalid_env_value
error_cases.condition: Environment variable is set but cannot be parsed as a positive integer

error_data.message: Invalid value for {env_var}: expected a positive integer, got '{env}'.

postconditions: Returns cli_val if not None
Otherwise returns parsed environment variable if set and valid
Otherwise returns default value

structured_side_effects.description: Reads environment variable specified by env_var parameter

functions.name: resolve_config
functions.description: Resolves EngineConfig from optional CLI arguments and environment variables. Validates that min values do not exceed max values for both understand and challenge phases.
postconditions: Returns EngineConfig with understand_min <= understand_max
Returns EngineConfig with challenge_min <= challenge_max

structured_side_effects.description: Reads CONSTRAIN_MIN_UNDERSTAND, CONSTRAIN_MAX_UNDERSTAND, CONSTRAIN_MIN_CHALLENGE, CONSTRAIN_MAX_CHALLENGE

functions.name: _run_engine
functions.description: Creates a ConversationEngine with the given session, manager, and config, runs the session, and writes artifacts (prompt.md, constraints.yaml) to current directory if session completes successfully.

error_cases.name: user_aborts_overwrite
error_cases.condition: Artifacts exist and user declines to overwrite in _confirm_overwrite

postconditions: Session has been executed via engine.run_session()
If session.phase is Phase.complete and session.prompt_md exists, artifacts are written to current directory
User is notified of artifact paths via click.echo
side_effects: Executes ConversationEngine which may interact with external APIs
May write prompt.md and constraints.yaml files to current directory
May prompt user for confirmation via _confirm_overwrite

structured_side_effects.description: Engine may make API calls during run_session()
Writes artifacts to current working directory on successful completion
Outputs artifact paths via click.echo

functions.name: _confirm_overwrite
functions.description: Checks if prompt.md or constraints.yaml exist in the given directory. If they do, prompts user for confirmation to overwrite. Returns True if user confirms, raises Abort if declined.

inputs.name: cwd
inputs.description: Directory to check for existing artifacts

error_cases.name: user_declines_overwrite
error_cases.condition: Artifacts exist and user does not confirm overwrite

postconditions: Returns False if no artifacts exist (no conflict)
Returns True if artifacts exist and user confirms overwrite
side_effects: Checks filesystem for existence of prompt.md and constraints.yaml
Prompts user via click.confirm if files exist

structured_side_effects.description: Checks if files exist in the specified directory

functions.name: cli
functions.description: Main Click group command. When invoked without subcommand, checks for incomplete sessions and prompts to resume, or creates a new session. Decorated with @click.group, @_round_options, and @click.pass_context.
postconditions: If subcommand is invoked, returns immediately without action
Otherwise ensures API key is set
If incomplete session exists, prompts user to resume/decline/list
Creates and runs new session if no incomplete session or user declines resume
side_effects: Prompts user for input via click.prompt

structured_side_effects.description: Reads API key and session data
Saves session data
May trigger API calls via _run_engine
Outputs session information and prompts

functions.name: cmd_new
functions.description: Click command to start a new session, ignoring any incomplete sessions. Decorated with @cli.command('new') and @_round_options.
postconditions: Creates a new session unconditionally
Saves and runs the new session

structured_side_effects.description: Reads API key and config environment variables
Saves session and potentially writes artifacts
Runs engine which may call external APIs

functions.name: cmd_resume
functions.description: Click command to resume an incomplete session by ID or latest. Decorated with @cli.command('resume') and @click.argument('session_id', required=False).

inputs.name: session_id
inputs.description: Optional session ID to resume; if None, resumes latest incomplete

error_data.message: Session '{session_id}' is already completed. Use 'constrain show' to view its artifacts.

error_cases.name: no_incomplete_sessions
error_cases.condition: No session_id provided and no incomplete sessions found

error_data.message: No incomplete sessions found. Use 'constrain new' to start one.

postconditions: Loads specified or latest incomplete session
Runs the session with default config

structured_side_effects.description: Loads session data and API key
May save session updates and write artifacts
Runs engine

functions.name: cmd_show
functions.description: Click command to display artifacts (prompt.md and constraints.yaml) from the most recent completed session. Decorated with @cli.command('show').

error_cases.name: no_completed_sessions
error_cases.condition: No completed sessions found in session list

error_data.message: No completed sessions found. Use 'constrain' to start one.

error_cases.name: artifacts_not_found
error_cases.condition: Latest completed session has no prompt_md

error_data.message: Artifacts not found in session {session.id[:8]}. They may not have been generated.

postconditions: Outputs prompt.md and constraints.yaml content to stdout

structured_side_effects.description: Loads session list and latest completed session
Outputs artifact content

functions.name: cmd_list
functions.description: Click command to list all sessions. Decorated with @cli.command('list'). Delegates to _do_list.
postconditions: Displays table of all sessions

structured_side_effects.description: Loads session list
Outputs session table

functions.name: _do_list
functions.description: Displays a formatted table of all sessions with ID, phase, rounds, posture, and updated timestamp.

inputs.name: mgr
inputs.description: Session manager to query for session list

error_data.message: No sessions found. Use 'constrain' to start one.

postconditions: Outputs formatted session table to stdout

structured_side_effects.description: Outputs session table with header and rows

functions.name: main
functions.description: Entry point for the constrain CLI. Simply invokes the cli() Click group.
postconditions: Invokes cli() Click group which handles command dispatch
side_effects: Delegates to cli() which has extensive side effects

structured_side_effects.description: Invokes Click group

functions.name: invoke
functions.description: SafeGroup.invoke override that wraps Click group invocation with centralized exception handling. Catches ClickException, Abort, KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit, and general exceptions, providing appropriate error messages and exit codes.
postconditions: Invokes parent Click.Group.invoke(ctx)
Handles exceptions and exits with appropriate codes: 1 for Abort/general errors, 130 for KeyboardInterrupt
side_effects: May call sys.exit() with codes 1 or 130
Outputs to stderr via click.echo(..., err=True)

structured_side_effects.description: Outputs error messages
May exit process with specific codes

invariants: API key must be non-empty when ensure_api_key() succeeds
Environment variables: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CONSTRAIN_MIN_UNDERSTAND, CONSTRAIN_MAX_UNDERSTAND, CONSTRAIN_MIN_CHALLENGE, CONSTRAIN_MAX_CHALLENGE
Artifacts written are prompt.md and constraints.yaml
SafeGroup exits with code 1 for Abort and general errors, 130 for KeyboardInterrupt
